notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Josh Jung.

notableEvents.label: Nelson Velázquez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nelson Velázquez called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín lines out to second baseman Nicky Lopez.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran singles on a ground ball to third baseman Nolan Gorman. Ezequiel Duran to 2nd. Ezequiel Duran advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Nolan Gorman.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Brandon Nimmo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Josh Jung.
